'''鈭歜-zh-g''' ('''bazhaga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:japan|japan]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-zh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:japan|japan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-zh-g
|-
! Lemma
| bazhaga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bazhagithi|bazhagithi]] || [[word:bazhagiji|bazhagiji]] || [[word:bazhagishi|bazhagishi]] || [[word:bazhagi|bazhagi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bazhaguthuth|bazhaguthuth]] || [[word:bazhagujuj|bazhagujuj]] || [[word:bazhagushush|bazhagushush]] || [[word:bazhag|bazhag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bazhaguthu|bazhaguthu]] || [[word:bazhaguju|bazhaguju]] || [[word:bazhagushu|bazhagushu]] || [[word:bazhagu|bazhagu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bazhagufuth|bazhagufuth]] || [[word:bazhagufuj|bazhagufuj]] || [[word:bazhagufush|bazhagufush]] || [[word:bazhaguf|bazhaguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bazhagethe|bazhagethe]] || [[word:bazhageje|bazhageje]] || [[word:bazhageshe|bazhageshe]] || [[word:bazhage|bazhage]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bazhagothoth|bazhagothoth]] || [[word:bazhagojoj|bazhagojoj]] || [[word:bazhagoshosh|bazhagoshosh]] || [[word:bazhag|bazhag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bazhagotho|bazhagotho]] || [[word:bazhagojo|bazhagojo]] || [[word:bazhagosho|bazhagosho]] || [[word:bazhago|bazhago]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bazhagofoth|bazhagofoth]] || [[word:bazhagofoj|bazhagofoj]] || [[word:bazhagofosh|bazhagofosh]] || [[word:bazhagof|bazhagof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bazhag忙th忙|bazhag忙th忙]] || [[word:bazhag忙j忙|bazhag忙j忙]] || [[word:bazhag忙sh忙|bazhag忙sh忙]] || [[word:bazhag忙|bazhag忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bazhagathath|bazhagathath]] || [[word:bazhagajaj|bazhagajaj]] || [[word:bazhagashash|bazhagashash]] || [[word:bazhag|bazhag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bazhagatha|bazhagatha]] || [[word:bazhagaja|bazhagaja]] || [[word:bazhagasha|bazhagasha]] || [[word:bazhaga|bazhaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bazhagafath|bazhagafath]] || [[word:bazhagafaj|bazhagafaj]] || [[word:bazhagafash|bazhagafash]] || [[word:bazhagaf|bazhagaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:bazhagasha|bazhagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gobazhagasha|gobazhagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokibazhagasha|gokibazhagasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:bazhagn眉sha|bazhagn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gobazhagnkn眉sha|gobazhagnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokibazhagn眉sha|gokibazhagn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bazhagsh毛sha|bazhagsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobazhagnksh毛sha|gobazhagnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibazhagsh毛sha|gokibazhagsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bazhagrosha|bazhagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobazhagnkrosha|gobazhagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibazhagrosha|gokibazhagrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bazhagmusha|bazhagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gobazhagnkmusha|gobazhagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibazhagmusha|gokibazhagmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:bazhagsherasha|bazhagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gobazhagnksherasha|gobazhagnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokibazhagsherasha|gokibazhagsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:bazhagngasha|bazhagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gobazhagnkngasha|gobazhagnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokibazhagngasha|gokibazhagngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bazhagyasha|bazhagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gobazhagnkyasha|gobazhagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokibazhagyasha|gokibazhagyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:bazhagyamasha|bazhagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gobazhagnkyamasha|gobazhagnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokibazhagyamasha|gokibazhagyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:bazhagn眉sh毛sha|bazhagn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobazhagnkn眉sh毛sha|gobazhagnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibazhagn眉sh毛sha|gokibazhagn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bazhagn眉rosha|bazhagn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobazhagnkn眉rosha|gobazhagnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibazhagn眉rosha|gokibazhagn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bazhagn眉musha|bazhagn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobazhagnkn眉musha|gobazhagnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibazhagn眉musha|gokibazhagn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:bazhagsh毛n眉sha|bazhagsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobazhagnksh毛n眉sha|gobazhagnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibazhagsh毛n眉sha|gokibazhagsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bazhagsh毛rosha|bazhagsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobazhagnksh毛rosha|gobazhagnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibazhagsh毛rosha|gokibazhagsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bazhagsh毛musha|bazhagsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobazhagnksh毛musha|gobazhagnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibazhagsh毛musha|gokibazhagsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:bazhagron眉sha|bazhagron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobazhagnkron眉sha|gobazhagnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibazhagron眉sha|gokibazhagron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:bazhagrosh毛sha|bazhagrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobazhagnkrosh毛sha|gobazhagnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibazhagrosh毛sha|gokibazhagrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bazhagromusha|bazhagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobazhagnkromusha|gobazhagnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibazhagromusha|gokibazhagromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:bazhagmun眉sha|bazhagmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobazhagnkmun眉sha|gobazhagnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibazhagmun眉sha|gokibazhagmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:bazhagmush毛sha|bazhagmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobazhagnkmush毛sha|gobazhagnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibazhagmush毛sha|gokibazhagmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bazhagmurosha|bazhagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobazhagnkmurosha|gobazhagnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibazhagmurosha|gokibazhagmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:bazhag|bazhag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:b忙zh忙g|b忙zh忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hobazhag|hobazhag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hob忙zh忙g|hob忙zh忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobazhag|hohobazhag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohob忙zh忙g|hohob忙zh忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉bazhag|n眉bazhag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉b忙zh忙g|n眉b忙zh忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉bazhag|n眉n眉bazhag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉b忙zh忙g|n眉n眉b忙zh忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂bazhag|n茂bazhag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂b忙zh忙g|n茂b忙zh忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂bazhag|n茂n茂bazhag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂b忙zh忙g|n茂n茂b忙zh忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lubazhag|lubazhag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lub忙zh忙g|lub忙zh忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubazhag|lulubazhag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulub忙zh忙g|lulub忙zh忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:libazhag|libazhag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lib忙zh忙g|lib忙zh忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibazhag|lilibazhag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilib忙zh忙g|lilib忙zh忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kobazhag|kobazhag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kob忙zh忙g|kob忙zh忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobazhag|kokobazhag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokob忙zh忙g|kokob忙zh忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kebazhag|kebazhag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keb忙zh忙g|keb忙zh忙g]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebazhag|kekebazhag]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeb忙zh忙g|kekeb忙zh忙g]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
